reasons: Angela can attach to Roger as he commits in wolf form, helping him survive the dive and continue chasing.
Roger can use Angela's protection to stay on a low-health or priority target longer.

proof.summary: Roger enters the fight to finish targets, while Angela adds protection and sustain during the dive window.
worksBestWhen: Angela attaches after Roger identifies a kill target.
Roger avoids diving into full enemy crowd control.
failureCases: Roger dives before Angela is ready.
The enemy kites until Angela's timing is wasted.

reasons: Rafaela's movement speed helps Roger chase or disengage, while her healing supports skirmish uptime.
Roger can use the speed window to enter wolf form and reach enemy damage dealers.

proof.summary: Roger wants to chase and finish targets, while Rafaela increases his movement reliability during skirmishes.
worksBestWhen: Rafaela speeds Roger before he enters wolf form.
Roger uses the movement window to target the enemy backline.
failureCases: Rafaela is forced to use healing defensively.
Enemy hard control stops Roger's chase.

reasons: Kaja can suppress and drag one target into Roger's range, giving Roger a safer execute path.
Roger can wait for Kaja's isolation before committing in wolf form.

proof.summary: Kaja isolates a priority target, while Roger follows with burst and chase damage.
worksBestWhen: Kaja catches an enemy carry or mage.
Roger waits to commit until the target is suppressed.
failureCases: Enemy teammates peel Roger away from the target.

reasons: Franco's hook or suppression creates a target Roger can immediately collapse on.
Roger can save his close-range commit until Franco has already controlled the target.

proof.summary: Franco starts the pick by dragging or suppressing a target, while Roger follows with close-range damage.
worksBestWhen: Franco catches squishy heroes near Roger.
Roger saves wolf-form commit until the target is controlled.
failureCases: The target survives and Roger cannot reset the fight.

reasons: Floryn's global heal can support Roger even when he is skirmishing away from the main team.
Roger benefits from global recovery when he commits to fast rotations or isolated fights.

proof.summary: Roger often fights in fast rotations, while Floryn can support his commit from anywhere with global healing.
worksBestWhen: Roger times his dive around Bloom availability.
Floryn saves ultimate for Roger's risky commit.
failureCases: Roger is bursted before healing matters.
Roger dives after Bloom has already been used.
